query: I'm writing a deployment script and I need to pull the list of site IDs from our sandbox programmatically. I want the output as JSON so I can parse it with jq and feed the IDs into our import step.

We just deployed a new cartridge called plugin_loyalty and I need to add it to the RefArch site's cartridge path, right after app_storefront_base. How do I do that without messing up the existing order?
I'm trying to figure out which of our storefronts are actually online right now on the staging instance. Is there a quick way to check their status from the terminal?
I need to verify that the cartridge path on our production instance matches what we have configured in our deployment manifest. How do I pull down the current cartridge path for a specific site?
We're decommissioning two sites from our instance and I need to first check all the site IDs and their statuses before we start the removal process. Can I get a table view of everything from the CLI?
Our deployment pipeline needs to reorder the cartridge path so that int_newpayment comes before int_oldpayment for the SiteGenesis site. I want to script this so it runs after every code deploy.
I need to set up the XML for a new site preference that controls whether our loyalty feature is enabled. What's the metadata format for preferences.xml?
How do I create a brand new storefront site in Business Manager with its own catalog and price book?
I need to push my cartridge code to the sandbox after making changes to my controllers. What's the deploy command?
I want to import a site archive with all the metadata and preferences onto a fresh sandbox. How do I structure the import directory?
